metadata.description: The agentic engineering team: ship product/scaffold changes through a GitHub-backed, cross-family-reviewed lifecycle. General-purpose — build any software via PR-reviewed agents.

plugins.name: aar-engineering
plugins.description: ship-change: drive a change through Issue -> worktree branch -> design doc -> draft PR -> cross-family --scaffold + --code review -> tracked .aar-ci checks -> fail-closed merge-when-clean. The agents are the engineers; one family authors, the other reviews.

plugins.name: verify-claims
plugins.description: The cross-family adversarial review engine ship-change gates on: --scaffold (design review of a change proposal) + --code (implementation review of a diff), read by the OPPOSITE model family. Self-contained in this repo.
